documentation.readme: 多端口监听 可设置转发代理，支持多级转发(代理链) 支持标准HTTP/HTTPS/HTTP2/SOCKS4(A)/SOCKS5代理协议 Web代理支持探测防御 支持多种隧道类型 SOCKS5代理支持TLS协商加密 Tunnel UDP over TCP TCP/UDP透明代理 本地/远程TCP/UDP端口转发 支持Shadowsocks(TCP/UDP)协议 支持SNI代理 权限控制 负载均衡 路由控制 DNS解析和代理 TUN/TAP设备
usage_sections: 作为标准的HTTP2代理，并向下兼容HTTPS代理。
作为转发通道，配合本地/远程TCP端口转发使用。
在gost运行目录放置cert.pem(公钥)和key.pem(私钥)两个文件即可，gost会自动加载运行目录下的cert.pem和key.pem文件。

arguments.name: --target
arguments.description: Target host, IP, MAC, or URL the tool operates on.

arguments.name: --output
arguments.description: Output file path for the report or capture.

arguments.name: --version
arguments.description: Print the tool version and exit.

arguments.name: --wordlist
arguments.description: Path to a wordlist (users, passwords, paths).

arguments.name: --dry-run
arguments.description: Print what would be done without making any changes.

arguments.name: --force
arguments.description: Force the action even if a safety check would block it.

documentation.how_to_use: Install/setup: git clone https://github.com/ginuerzh/gost.git; docker run --rm ginuerzh/gost -V. Run the primary entrypoint as shown in upstream docs, e.g. `cd gost/cmd/gost`. Further invocations from upstream: `docker run --rm ginuerzh/gost -V`; `gost -L=:8080`. 多端口监听 可设置转发代理，支持多级转发(代理链) 支持标准HTTP/HTTPS/HTTP2/SOCKS4(A)/SOCKS5代理协议 Web代理支持探测防御 支持多种隧道类型 SOCKS5代理支持TLS协商加密 Tunnel UDP over TCP TCP/UDP透明代理 本地/远程TCP/UDP端口转发 支持Shadowsocks(TCP/UDP)协议 支持SNI代理 权限控制 负载均衡 路由控制 DNS解析和代理 TUN/TAP设备.

trust.warning: Attribution / index entry only. The operator must audit the code, the README, the license, and the releases before invoking. Phase 5 — entry is auto-generated from the operator's curated fetch list; no automated enrichment yet.

use_cases: When you need c2, use gost because 多端口监听 可设置转发代理，支持多级转发(代理链) 支持标准HTTP/HTTPS/HTTP2/SOCKS4(A)/SOCKS5代理协议 Web代理支持探测防御 支持多种隧道类型 SOCKS5代理支持TLS协商加密 Tunnel UDP over TCP TCP/UDP透明代理 本地/远程TCP/UDP端口转发 支持Sh.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `cd gost/cmd/gost` as documented upstream for gost.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `docker run --rm ginuerzh/gost -V` as documented upstream for gost.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `gost -L=:8080` as documented upstream for gost.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `gost -L=admin:123456@localhost:8080` as documented upstream for gost.
When chaining c2 tools, pair gost with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `gost --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
